name: opsboard-workflow
description: Dependency-aware GitHub issue delivery with subagent worktrees and durable OPSBOARD status.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate GitHub issues with dependency-aware subagent worktrees and durable status.
interface.longDescription: Analyze GitHub issue dependencies, dispatch independent ready issues to isolated git-worktree subagents, request human decisions in the relevant issue when needed, and reconcile a repository-owned .opsboard ledger across invocations.
defaultPrompt: Use OPSBOARD to plan and implement GitHub issues #123 and #456.
Resume the OPSBOARD status for GitHub issue #123 and check for human replies.
